migrations.message: All MVP hardening, governance, marketplace, maker economy, AI governance, geometry, routing, dispatch, customer care, sustainability, investor, demo, pilot launch and public pilot migrations are present.

warnings: APP_ENV is not production; this is acceptable for local smoke tests.

runtime.message: Runtime is usable, but one or more optional extensions should be enabled before production.

backup.message: At least one completed backup exists.

notification_center.message: Notification and escalation tables are available.

privacy_governance.message: Privacy, consent and data governance tables are available.

release_management.message: Release management and pilot readiness tables are available.

partner_onboarding.message: Partner onboarding governance tables are available.

marketplace_revenue.message: Marketplace revenue, credits and payout governance tables are available.

maker_economy.message: Maker economy, model licensing and repair bounty governance tables are available.

ai_pipeline_governance.message: AI pipeline governance, human review, dataset and safety rule tables are available.

ai_provider_sandbox.message: AI provider adapter sandbox and job orchestration tables are available. Missing provider secrets remain warnings while adapters are mock/sandbox only.

geometry_printability.message: CAD/geometry validation and printability governance tables are available. Real mesh/CAD kernel analysis remains out of scope for the local pilot.

provider_routing.message: Provider capability, machine profile and fulfilment routing governance tables are available. Real capacity booking remains out of scope for the local pilot.

dispatch_governance.message: Dispatch, shipment tracking and proof-of-repair governance tables are available. Real courier booking and return logistics remain out of scope for the local pilot.

customer_care_governance.message: Customer acceptance, warranty placeholder and post-repair support governance tables are available. Legal warranty terms, refunds and CRM integrations remain out of scope for the local pilot.

sustainability_impact.message: Sustainability impact, circularity metrics and repair outcome intelligence tables are available. Public environmental claims remain out of scope until methodology is validated.

investor_reporting.message: Investor demo KPI, narrative and board reporting governance tables are available. Metrics remain pilot/local evidence until externally validated.

demo_walkthrough.message: Demo mode, guided repair journey and investor walkthrough tables are available. Demo output remains local/pilot evidence with explicit caveats.

pilot_launch.message: Demo data room, pilot launch checklist and stakeholder feedback loop tables are available. Pilot launch remains conditional until legal, provider, fulfilment and production readiness are validated.

public_pilot.message: Public pilot demo, external stakeholder intake, lead scoring and real-world validation case tables are available. Public pilot remains controlled and caveated until legal, provider, payments, fulfilment and production readiness are validated.

status_page.public_note: This MVP status payload is local/pilot oriented and does not replace external uptime monitoring.
